## Severity

- [ ] 🔴 Critical — blocks core functionality
- [ ] 🟠 High — major feature broken but workaround exists
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — annoying but doesn't block anything
- [ ] 🟢 Low — cosmetic / minor polish
